# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /api
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

  - name: orders-service
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /api
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

  - name: payments-service
    protocol: http
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /api
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        paths:
          - /payments
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0

  - name: inventory-service
    protocol: http
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /api
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        paths:
          - /inventory
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: users-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:

        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10

          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3

        weight: 100

        weight: 100
